evals.prompt: Generate the full test suite for BakeryPilot. Add pytest tests for the backend covering the health endpoint and all API routers, import-smoke tests for the agent, Jest + RTL tests for the frontend components, and create the GitHub Actions CI workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml.
evals.expected_output: All test files written, GitHub Actions CI YAML created, frontend test tooling installed and configured. A summary listing every file created is printed at the end.
expectations: backend/tests/conftest.py is created with a TestClient fixture
backend/tests/test_health.py tests GET /healthz returns 200 with {status: ok}
At least 5 backend test files are created (one per router domain)
agent/tests/test_imports.py is created with importable checks for tool modules
frontend/src/__tests__/ directory contains at least one test file
.github/workflows/ci.yml is created with 3 jobs: backend-tests, agent-tests, frontend-tests
The CI workflow triggers on push and pull_request
DATABASE_URL is set to empty string or omitted in CI to avoid needing a real database
A summary of created files is printed at the end

evals.prompt: We just added a new API router for /api/pallets in backend/app/api/pallets.py. Run gen-tests to add tests for it without touching any existing test files.
evals.expected_output: Only backend/tests/test_api_pallets.py is created. Existing test files are untouched.
expectations: The test reads the actual pallets.py route file before writing the test
Existing test files are not overwritten
The new test checks GET /api/pallets returns 200 and a list

evals.prompt: Set up CI for BakeryPilot — just the GitHub Actions workflow. I already have tests written, I just need the .github/workflows/ci.yml file.
evals.expected_output: Only .github/workflows/ci.yml is created. No test files are generated.
expectations: The workflow has jobs for backend, agent, and frontend
uv is used for Python package management (not pip)
Node 20 is used for the frontend job
Caching is configured for both uv virtualenv and npm
